newsSinceJun6: No new press releases or contracts since June 6. CTO Noam Arkind's 10b5-1 sales of ~200,000 shares (executed June 2-3 at $1.09-$1.18) were reported June 5-7 - a soft negative, not thesis-changing. Stock has drifted from ~$1.13 (June 2) to $0.85, deepening the breach of Nasdaq's $1 minimum bid requirement (compliance deadline Oct 12, 2026), which raises reverse-split/dilution risk given $53.6M cash against a guided $(28)-$(31)M 2026 adjusted EBITDA loss. Q1 results (May 28: $0.5M revenue, 2026 guidance of $4-6M reaffirmed, Phoenix robotaxi follow-on orders, Hirain China expansion) were already known before June 6.

sources.label: StockTitan - ARBE news feed (no items June 5-9; Q1 results May 28)
Daily Political - CTO Noam Arkind sells 175,862 shares (10b5-1)
StockTitan - Form 4: CTO sells 200,000 shares under 10b5-1 plan

verdicts.rankRationale: Already #1 on the robotics page with no new fundamental evidence since June 6; today's -3.4% is drift. The continued sell-off marginally improves entry asymmetry, but that is offset by the deepening sub-$1 Nasdaq breach and fresh CTO 10b5-1 selling, so neither the rank nor the score should move.
verdicts.bull: A $150M-cap, genuinely under-owned pure-play on imaging radar trading near all-time lows; Phoenix robotaxi follow-on orders and the Hirain China platform show commercialization is starting, and radar redundancy gets more valuable as robots and AVs leave controlled demos.
verdicts.neutral: Thesis intact but unproven: $0.5M Q1 revenue against a $4-6M full-year guide and $1M backlog means the design-win-to-revenue conversion is still ahead, and the stock will trade on financing optics until then.
verdicts.bear: Burning $28-31M a year against $53.6M cash with the stock 15% below Nasdaq's $1 minimum bid - a reverse split or dilutive raise into weakness is increasingly likely, and the CTO is selling, however pre-arranged.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: A named OEM/robotaxi production design win or backlog inflection at the Aug 12 Q2 report that validates the $4-6M 2026 revenue guide.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Dilutive capital raise or reverse split forced by the cash burn and the October 12, 2026 Nasdaq minimum-bid deadline.
